name: morphologyBreakdown
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || typeof output.result.prefix === 'string'
output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || typeof output.result.root === 'string'
output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || typeof output.result.suffix === 'string'
output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || typeof output.result.wordClass === 'string'
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler. Dispatch key 'linguistics.morphologyBreakdown'. Reads artifact.data.word (String-coerced — hardened). Returns {word,prefix,root,suffix,morphemeCount,wordClass}; morphemeCount = (prefix?1:0)+1+(suffix?1:0). FINITE morphemeCount on poisoned input, never throws.
